title: Hazardous Oceans
description: Multipurpose modpack focused on the ocean, exploration, QOL and building. Suitable for many playstyles and made with servers in mind.
body:
![Deep blue background with square bubble text that says Hazardous Oceans with green fog surrounding and partly covering it, with a couple black chains decorating it far back and in the forefront.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/258cbf3375ee2ba579a585f3f9df3822414b0f41_0.webp)
## Hazardous Oceans
**Is a modpack for people who love fighting, building, tomfoolery, shiny trinkets, exploration and getting wet! ;D**

*Well suited for singleplayer and servers!*

This adventure includes:

**Piratery!**

- Lots of new boats to build, decorate and explore with!
- Pirate themed clothes and accessories
- New treasures and artifacts!
- Better combat with more weapons *(like _Warglaives_ and more)*
- Gun.
- Ocean upgrades *(with new mobs and structures! like sharks and underwater ruins, tidal towns and more)*
- Ocean themed boss! 
- New fishing system and loot *with Tide*
- Beach parties

**As well as:**

- Quality of Life *we all know and love and cant live without... (Tree chopping, easy harvesting, inventory management, sleeping bags, mastercutter, excavators and hammers, searchable keybinds, map with waypoints and more.*
- A musical touch 
- Create mod!
- New farming and foods *(Farmers delight and Let's Do Candlelight, Brewery and Vinery and more!)*
- Many trinkets *for upgrading yourself or your surroundings* (Artifacts, Supplementaries etc.)
- More ~~friends~~ mobs *with Critters and Companions*
- Activities to explore *in the down times like Photography, Painting, Improved Archeology*
- New biomes *with Regions Unexplored!*
- Lots of new blocks and furniture *for your decorator and builder hearts (Decorative Blocks, Fantasys Furniture, Chipped, Rechiseled and more)*
- Server focused things *such as proximity chat, customizable skins and emotes, optimizations*
- Shaders included!
- **Hours of fun!!!**

**!!!!!!!!**

**Important;** Do not click the big enticing button that says; Update All, it **WILL BREAK** the modpack! Specifically, *Create* and *Supplementaries* can NOT be updated, the rest should be fine. It is also advised to check the keybinding page before starting to play, there are some keys that should be rebound. :)

-----------
**Mod Credits:**
[Cosmetic Armor Reworked - Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cosmetic-armor-reworked) 
[Enchantment Transfer - Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/enchantment-transfer)
